message:
feat(command,runtime,store): add live stats reporting to INFO, expand store metrics

- fr-command/lib.rs: replace hardcoded zeros in INFO command output with
  live store metrics — blocked_clients, tracking_clients, maxmemory
  (with human-readable formatting), expired_keys, evicted_keys,
  keyspace_hits, keyspace_misses, and expiry cycle CPU time are now
  reported from actual store state rather than stub values
- fr-command/lib.rs: pass store reference to latency_cmd for stateful
  latency tracking
- fr-store/lib.rs: add stat tracking fields (stat_blocked_clients,
  stat_tracking_clients, stat_expired_keys, stat_evicted_keys,
  stat_keyspace_hits, stat_keyspace_misses, stat_expire_cycle_cpu_milliseconds,
  stat_expired_stale_perc, maxmemory_bytes_live)
- fr-runtime/lib.rs: expand runtime infrastructure to support new
  statistics collection and reporting
- fr-server/main.rs: minor integration update

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
